leadText: Anger Point (Japanese: いかりのつぼ Anger Pressure Point) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation IV 1.1.2 Generation V onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a critical hit , Anger Point maximizes its Attack stat by raising it to +6 stages (regardless of its current stage). Anger Point will activate even if the Pokémon's substitute is hit. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] Anger Point no longer activates if the Pokémon's substitute is hit. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Anger Point has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a critical hit , Anger Point maximizes its Attack stat by raising it to +6 stages (regardless of its current stage). Anger Point will activate even if the Pokémon's substitute is hit. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] Anger Point no longer activates if the Pokémon's substitute is hit.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Boosts the Pokémon's Attack when the Pokémon suffers a critical hit. B S L きゅうしょに こうげきをうけた ちょくごの こうげきが つよくなる MD GtI Unavailable S MD If the Pokémon takes a critical hit, its Attack goes up sharply! MD RT DX If the Pokémon takes a critical hit, its rage makes its Attack go up sharply!
